summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ticksy attendance tracking app. Backend health endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI renders perfectly with all required data-testid attributes. Navigation between public pages works correctly. Protected routes redirect properly. However, Supabase authentication is still failing with the same 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error from previous iteration, preventing testing of authenticated features.

integration_issues.issue: Supabase Auth calls failing with 400/429 status and 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error. Sign up shows 429 rate limiting, login shows 400 error.

passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint returns status healthy
Backend root API endpoint returns Ticksy API message
Landing page loads with Ticksy branding and subtitle
Sign Up and Log In buttons visible and clickable
Login page renders with email/password inputs and submit button
Sign Up page renders with email/password inputs and submit button
Navigation between Landing → Login → Sign Up works correctly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Form inputs are focusable and accept text input correctly
Submit buttons are enabled and clickable
Protected routes (/dashboard, /students, /slots, /calendar) redirect to landing when not authenticated
UI elements render correctly with proper Ticksy styling and branding
All required data-testid attributes present on all tested pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Supabase authentication integration. The error 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' suggests the response body is being read multiple times in the auth flow. Check AuthContext.js and auth form handlers for proper response handling. Verify Supabase client configuration and ensure the provided credentials are valid. The 429 rate limiting on sign up suggests the endpoint is being called correctly but hitting limits.
success_percentage: Backend: 100%, Frontend UI: 100%, Frontend Auth: 0%, Protected Features: 0% (blocked by auth)
